danish-salted-butter-cookies.name: Danish Salted-butter Cookies

ingredients.item: A 3-inch-diameter and a 1 0.5-inch-diameter fluted cookie cutter

instructions: Combine butter and granulated sugar in a large bowl; scrape in vanilla seeds and discard pod. Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat until very light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Beat in 1 egg. Reduce speed to low; gradually mix in 2 cups flour. Form dough into a ¾"-thick disk. Wrap in plastic and chill until firm, about 2 hours.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven and preheat to 350°. Let disk of dough sit at room temperature until slightly softened, about 5 minutes. Roll out on a lightly floured sheet of parchment paper, shifting often on sheet and dusting with more flour as needed to keep from sticking, until about ¼" thick.
Punch out rounds with large cutter; punch out centers with smaller cutter. Transfer to parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 1½" apart. Pat scraps into a ¾"-thick disk. Chill 15 minutes.

Beat remaining egg in a small bowl with 1 tsp. water; brush cookies with egg wash; sprinkle with sanding sugar. Freeze 10 minutes. Bake, rotating baking sheets halfway through, until edges are golden brown, 10–15 minutes. Transfer to wire racks; let cool. Repeat with scraps and remaining egg wash and sanding sugar.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 month ahead; freeze. Cookies can be baked 2 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

dehydrated-mango-rolls-a-healthy-snack-c.name: Dehydrated Mango Rolls: A Healthy Snack
dehydrated-mango-rolls-a-healthy-snack-c.original_name: Rollos de mango deshidratado: un snack saludable
instructions: It purifies the oven at 60 been 3 been.
Add mango, mango and syrup and orange juice to the blender.
Loan well till some fruit and achieve purée consistency.
Put on a baking paper plate or a silicone cover, scattering the whole purée evenly with a thin but non-transparent cape (don't let the bottom)
That's how you're gonna bake at 60's 3's for 4 hours. Turn the plate every 30 minutes and let cook till it feels dry
When ready, remove them and let them rest for a few minutes to tighten them. Then cut into strips and roll with your fingers.
Cuando vayas a comerlos, retira el papel para hornear y disfruta.

delicious-carrot-and-apple-muffins-comed.name: Delicious Carrot And Apple Muffins
delicious-carrot-and-apple-muffins-comed.original_name: Deliciosos muffins de zanahoria y manzana

ingredients.item: ½ cup of vegetable oil (sunflower or canola)
½ cup of minced nuts (optional but recommended)

instructions: First, purify the oven at 180 been 3 and prepare a mold for muffins by placing paper capacitors or slightly grease them.
In a big bowl mix eggs with brown sugar, vegetable oil and vanilla extract up to a homogenous blend.
Add the carrot and the frosted apple and have them well with smooth movements.
En otro bol mezcla la harina, polvo para hornear, bicarbonato, canela y una pizca de sal.
It slowly incorporates the dry ingredients into the moist mix, gently stirring so that they do not have a clumps but without an excessive mix.
Si decides usar nueces, este es el momento de agregarlas a la mezcla, reservando algunas para decorar.
Fill every capacillo up to 3% of its capacity and decorate above with some minced nuts if you want a more beautiful finish.
Hornea durante 20-25 minutos, hasta que al insertar un palillo salga limpio y los muffins tengan un color dorado agradable.
When they're ready, get them out of the oven and let them stand in a grid till they get cold.

delish-black-mission-figs.name: Delish Black Mission Figs!

ingredients.prep: trimmed of all fat and cut into strips

instructions: Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Place fig halves, cut-sides up, on a baking sheet; top each with goat cheese. Arrange prosciutto strips on goat cheese layer.
Broil in the preheated oven until prosciutto is crisp and goat cheese is melted, 3 to 5 minutes.
Transfer warm figs to a serving platter; drizzle with honey.

diy-sour-frozen-grapes.name: Diy Sour Frozen Grapes

ingredients.item: Food-grade citric acid or 12–16 packets truelemon

instructions: In a large bowl, combine 4 cups seedless grapes with the juice of 3 lemons (about 6 Tbsp.). Toss to combine.
In a separate bowl, combine ¼ cup sugar with 2–3 tsp. food-grade citric acid or 12–16 packets TrueLemon.
Roll each grape, one at a time, in the sugar-citric acid mixture until evenly coated.
Freeze in a single layer on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet for at least 2 hours.
You can enjoy them right away, or transfer them to an airtight container for up to 3 months in the freezer.

doggie-birthday-cake.name: Doggie Birthday Cake
instructions: Combine egg, honey, peanut butter, oil, and vanilla in a large bowl; blend well.
Stir in carrots until well-combined.
Sift together flour and baking soda and fold into carrot mixture.
Spoon cake batter into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes.
Let cake cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a wire rack to cool completely.

duck-with-orange-and-port-wine-teleculin.name: Duck With Orange And Port Wine
duck-with-orange-and-port-wine-teleculin.original_name: Pato com laranja e vinho do Porto
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 degrees. In a bowl, mix some salt, pepper, garlic and chopped onions, thyme and orange into pieces. Fill the duck with this mixture, put it on an oven tray and bar with butter and some salt. Put it in the oven for 45 minutes.
Num tachinho, deite o sumo e a raspa de laranja, o mel, a estrela de anis, o pau de canela e o vinho do Porto. Leve ao lume e deixe ferver durante 5 minutos.
After finishing the recommended time to roast the duck, water it with half the previous sauce and let it roast for another 20 minutes.
Cut the pumpkin into pieces and dispose of them around the duck as well as the grapes. Water the duck with the remaining sauce and put it in the oven for another 55 minutes. Remove and serve hot.

Num tachinho, deite o sumo e a raspa de laranja, o mel, a estrela de anis, o pau de canela e o vinho do Porto. Leve ao lume e deixe ferver durante 5 minutos.
After finishing the recommended time to roast the duck, water it with half the previous sauce and let it roast for another 20 minutes.
Cut the pumpkin into pieces and dispose of them around the duck as well as the grapes. Water the duck with the remaining sauce and put it in the oven for another 55 minutes. Remove and serve hot.

dulce-de-leche-pancakes-recipe-comedera.name: Dulce De Leche Pancakes Recipe
dulce-de-leche-pancakes-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de panqueques de dulce de leche
instructions: For pancakes we mix butter with sugar.
Add the egg, flour and 1 glass of milk, mix up till you have no grooves.
To make the sweet sauce we added 1 glass of milk and 3 tablespoons of sweet.
Cocina a fuego lento hasta que espese.
In a hot frying pan we add the butter and as hot you add 1 tablespoon of the mixture to make 1 pancake.
For the first choice we get a pancake and fill with sweet and caramelized with sugar.
For the other option we double pancakes and add the salsa above.
Agrega avellanas y menta para decorar.
